description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a rich, dark brown leather or leather-like material. The sofa features three large, attached seat cushions and three equally sized, attached backrest cushions, all with a smooth, slightly padded appearance. The armrests are wide, gently sloped, and padded, seamlessly integrated into the overall form of the sofa. The back of the sofa is plain and fully covered in the same material, with no visible seams or decorative elements. The legs are short and mostly recessed, making them barely visible and giving the sofa a grounded, monolithic look. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on comfort and durability.
description: A contemporary, dark brown leather sofa with three attached seat and back cushions, wide padded armrests, and a sleek, monolithic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large seat and back cushions, wide padded armrests, and the sofa's full width.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the backrest, and the sloped, padded armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, uninterrupted back panel with no visible seams or decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the armrest profile and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, attached seat cushions and three attached backrest cushions, all uniform in size and shape, forming a continuous seating and back area.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, padded armrests with a gently sloped profile, integrated into the sofa's body and positioned at seat height, with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, recessed legs, likely four in total, minimally visible and possibly made of wood or metal, giving the sofa a low, grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with three attached, padded cushions, matching the seat cushion arrangement and providing full back support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown color with a smooth, leather-like finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
